LanguageData.SubspaceAssetBlackhole.label: Subspace Asset Blackhole Generator
LanguageData.SubspaceAssetBlackhole.description: A mysterious device from the underground black market of the archotech world, capable of folding colony assets into subspace, hiding the colony's existence, causing enemies to underestimate the colony's wealth, and thus reducing raid sizes! Make your colony an invisible base in the eyes of the enemy!
